name: Random Adventure
description: Let the AI create a unique world from scratch — any genre, any setting
world: An infinite multiverse of possibilities awaits. Every story begins differently, shaped by the players' choices and the AI Game Master's imagination. No two adventures are ever the same.
opening_hook: The AI Game Master will create a completely unique world and opening scenario based on player actions and choices.

locations.name: The Unknown
locations.description: A place yet to be discovered, waiting to be shaped by adventure

writing_style.tone: Adaptive — shifts to match the emerging genre and mood

special_rules: The AI Game Master has complete creative freedom to generate any type of world
Genre, setting, and tone emerge from player card choices
No predefined story structure — pure improvisation
The world adapts and expands based on player actions
